name: Ocarina of Time
description: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is a 3D action/adventure game.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Logic Rules
options.description: Set the logic used for the generator.

options.label: Logic No Night Tokens Without Suns Song
options.description: When enabled, nighttime skulltulas logically require Sun's Song.

options.label: Logic Tricks
options.description: Set various tricks for logic in Ocarina of Time.

options.label: Open Forest
options.description: Set the state of Kokiri Forest and the path to Deku Tree.

options.label: Open Kakariko
options.description: Set the state of the Kakariko Village gate for child.

options.label: Open Door Of Time
options.description: When enabled, the Door of Time starts opened, without needing Song of Time.

options.label: Zora Fountain
options.description: Set the state of King Zora, blocking the way to Zora's Fountain.

options.label: Gerudo Fortress
options.description: Set the requirements for access to Gerudo Fortress.

options.label: Bridge
options.description: Set the requirements for the Rainbow Bridge.

options.label: Trials
options.description: Set the number of required trials in Ganon's Castle.

options.label: Starting Age
options.description: Choose which age Link will start as.

options.label: Shuffle Interior Entrances
options.description: Shuffles interior entrances.

options.label: Shuffle Grotto Entrances
options.description: Shuffles grotto and grave entrances.

options.label: Shuffle Dungeon Entrances
options.description: Shuffles dungeon entrances.

options.label: Shuffle Overworld Entrances
options.description: Shuffles overworld loading zones.

options.label: Owl Drops
options.description: Randomizes owl drops from Lake Hylia or Death Mountain Trail as child.

options.label: Warp Songs
options.description: Randomizes warp song destinations.

options.label: Spawn Positions
options.description: Randomizes the starting position on loading a save.

options.label: Shuffle Bosses
options.description: Shuffles boss entrances.

options.label: Triforce Hunt
options.description: Gather pieces of the Triforce scattered around the world to complete the game.

options.label: Triforce Goal
options.description: Number of Triforce pieces required to complete the game.

options.label: Extra Triforce Percentage
options.description: Percentage of additional Triforce pieces in the pool.

options.label: Bombchus In Logic
options.description: Bombchus are properly considered in logic.

options.label: Dungeon Shortcuts
options.description: Shortcuts to dungeon bosses are available without any requirements.

options.label: Dungeon Shortcuts List
options.description: Chosen dungeons to have shortcuts.

options.label: Mq Dungeons Mode
options.description: Choose between vanilla and Master Quest dungeon layouts.

options.label: Mq Dungeons List
options.description: With MQ dungeons as Specific: chosen dungeons to be MQ layout.

options.label: Mq Dungeons Count
options.description: With MQ dungeons as Count: number of randomly-selected dungeons to be MQ layout.

options.label: Bridge Stones
options.description: With Stones bridge: set the number of Spiritual Stones required.

options.label: Bridge Medallions
options.description: With Medallions bridge: set the number of medallions required.

options.label: Bridge Rewards
options.description: With Dungeons bridge: set the number of dungeon rewards required.

options.label: Bridge Tokens
options.description: With Tokens bridge: set the number of Gold Skulltula Tokens required.

options.label: Bridge Hearts
options.description: With Hearts bridge: set the number of hearts required.

options.label: Shuffle Mapcompass
options.description: Control where to shuffle dungeon maps and compasses.

options.label: Shuffle Smallkeys
options.description: Control where to shuffle dungeon small keys.

options.label: Shuffle Hideoutkeys
options.description: Control where to shuffle the Thieves' Hideout small keys.

options.label: Shuffle Bosskeys
options.description: Control where to shuffle boss keys, except the Ganon's Castle Boss Key.

options.label: Enhance Map Compass
options.description: Map tells if a dungeon is vanilla or MQ.

options.label: Shuffle Ganon Bosskey
options.description: Control how to shuffle the Ganon's Castle Boss Key (GCBK).

options.label: Ganon Bosskey Medallions
options.description: With medallions GCBK: set how many medallions are required to receive GCBK.

options.label: Ganon Bosskey Stones
options.description: With stones GCBK: set how many Spiritual Stones are required to receive GCBK.

options.label: Ganon Bosskey Rewards
options.description: With dungeons GCBK: set how many dungeon rewards are required to receive GCBK.

options.label: Ganon Bosskey Tokens
options.description: With tokens GCBK: set how many Gold Skulltula Tokens are required to receive GCBK.

options.label: Ganon Bosskey Hearts
options.description: With hearts GCBK: set how many hearts are required to receive GCBK.

options.label: Key Rings
options.description: A key ring grants all dungeon small keys at once, rather than individually.

options.label: Key Rings List
options.description: With key rings as Choose: select areas with key rings rather than individual small keys.

options.label: Shuffle Song Items
options.description: Set where songs can appear.

options.label: Shopsanity
options.description: Randomizes shop contents.

options.label: Shop Slots
options.description: With Shopsanity fixed number: quantity of multiworld locations per shop to be randomized.

options.label: Shopsanity Prices
options.description: Controls prices of shop locations.

options.label: Tokensanity
options.description: Token rewards from Gold Skulltulas can be shuffled into the pool.

options.label: Shuffle Scrubs
options.description: Shuffle the items sold by Business Scrubs, and set the prices.

options.label: Shuffle Child Trade
options.description: Controls the behavior of the start of the child trade quest.

options.label: Shuffle Freestanding Items
options.description: Shuffles freestanding rupees, recovery hearts, Shadow Temple Spinning Pots, and Goron Pot drops.

options.label: Shuffle Pots
options.description: Shuffles pots and flying pots which normally contain an item.

options.label: Shuffle Crates
options.description: Shuffles large and small crates containing an item.

options.label: Shuffle Cows
options.description: Cows give items when Epona's Song is played.

options.label: Shuffle Beehives
options.description: Beehives drop an item when destroyed by an explosion, the Hookshot, or the Boomerang.

options.label: Shuffle Kokiri Sword
options.description: Shuffle Kokiri Sword into the item pool.

options.label: Shuffle Ocarinas
options.description: Shuffle the Fairy Ocarina and Ocarina of Time into the item pool.

options.label: Shuffle Gerudo Card
options.description: Shuffle the Gerudo Membership Card into the item pool.

options.label: Shuffle Beans
options.description: Adds a pack of 10 beans to the item pool and changes the bean salesman to sell one item for 60 rupees.

options.label: Shuffle Medigoron Carpet Salesman
options.description: Shuffle the items sold by Medigoron and the Haunted Wasteland Carpet Salesman.

options.label: Shuffle Frog Song Rupees
options.description: Shuffles the purple rupees received from the Zora's River frogs.

options.label: No Escape Sequence
options.description: Skips the tower collapse sequence between the Ganondorf and Ganon fights.

options.label: No Guard Stealth
options.description: The crawlspace into Hyrule Castle skips straight to Zelda.

options.label: No Epona Race
options.description: Epona can always be summoned with Epona's Song.

options.label: Skip Some Minigame Phases
options.description: Dampe Race and Horseback Archery give both rewards if the second condition is met on the first attempt.

options.label: Complete Mask Quest
options.description: All masks are immediately available to borrow from the Happy Mask Shop.

options.label: Useful Cutscenes
options.description: Reenables the Poe cutscene in Forest Temple, Darunia in Fire Temple, and Twinrova introduction.

options.label: Fast Chests
options.description: All chest animations are fast.

options.label: Free Scarecrow
options.description: Pulling out the ocarina near a scarecrow spot spawns Pierre without needing the song.

options.label: Fast Bunny Hood
options.description: Bunny Hood lets you move 1.5x faster like in Majora's Mask.

options.label: Plant Beans
options.description: Pre-plants all 10 magic beans in the soft soil spots.

options.label: Chicken Count
options.description: Controls the number of Cuccos for Anju to give an item as child.

options.label: Big Poe Count
options.description: Number of Big Poes required for the Poe Collector's item.

options.label: Fae Torch Count
options.description: Number of lit torches required to open Shadow Temple.

options.label: Correct Chest Appearances
options.description: Changes chest textures and/or sizes to match their contents.

options.label: Minor Items As Major Chest
options.description: Hylian Shield, Deku Shield, and Bombchus appear in big/gold chests.

options.label: Invisible Chests
options.description: Chests visible only with Lens of Truth.

options.label: Correct Potcrate Appearances
options.description: Changes the appearance of pots, crates, and beehives that contain items.

options.label: Hints
options.description: Gossip Stones can give hints about item locations.

options.label: Misc Hints
options.description: The Temple of Time altar hints dungeon rewards, bridge info, and Ganon BK info; Ganondorf hints the Light Arrows; Dampe's diary hints a local Hookshot if one exists; Skulltula House locations hint their item.

options.label: Hint Dist
options.description: Choose the hint distribution to use.

options.label: Text Shuffle
options.description: Randomizes text in the game for comedic effect.

options.label: Damage Multiplier
options.description: Controls the amount of damage Link takes.

options.label: Deadly Bonks
options.description: Bonking on a wall or object will hurt Link.

options.label: No Collectible Hearts
options.description: Hearts will not drop from enemies or objects.

options.label: Starting Tod
options.description: Change the starting time of day.

options.label: Blue Fire Arrows
options.description: Ice arrows can melt red ice and break the mud walls in Dodongo's Cavern.

options.label: Fix Broken Drops
options.description: Fixes two broken vanilla drops: deku shield in child Spirit Temple, and magic drop on GTG eye statue.

options.label: Start With Consumables
options.description: Start the game with full Deku Sticks and Deku Nuts.

options.label: Start With Rupees
options.description: Start with a full wallet.

options.label: Item Pool Value
options.description: Changes the number of items available in the game.

options.label: Junk Ice Traps
options.description: Adds ice traps to the item pool.

options.label: Ice Trap Appearance
options.description: Changes the appearance of traps, including other games' traps, as freestanding items.

options.label: Adult Trade Start
